# Nonacog Beta Pegol 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Nonacog Beta Pegol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Nonacog Beta Pegol</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Nonacog Beta Pegol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment and prophylaxis of bleeding in patients with haemophilia B (congenital factor IX deficiency). Refixia can be used for all age groups.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary release disorder of platelets（98.6%）</li>
<li>Glanzmann thrombasthenia（98.5%）</li>
<li>pseudo-von Willebrand disease（98.2%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disorder due to a constitutional thrombocytopenia（94.8%）</li>
<li>bleeding diathesis due to a collagen receptor defect（94.5%）</li>
<li>Scott syndrome（93.4%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（91.4%）</li>
<li>fetal and neonatal alloimmune thrombocytopenia（88.1%）</li>
<li>platelet-type bleeding disorder（87.7%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytosis with transverse limb defect（86.4%）</li>
<li>familial thrombomodulin anomalies（86.3%）</li>
<li>flood factor deficiency（86.1%）</li>
<li>hemophilia（86.1%）</li>
<li>acquired coagulation factor deficiency（86.1%）</li>
<li>hemorrhagic disease of newborn（83.6%）</li>
<li>diabetic retinopathy（81.3%）</li>
<li>inherited thrombophilia（80.4%）</li>
<li>Ehlers-Danlos syndrome, fibronectinemic type（79.6%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant macrothrombocytopenia（77.2%）</li>
<li>methylcobalamin deficiency type cblG（75.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/nonacog-beta-pegol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
